configs.purpose: bounded TraceCalc-to-engine observable-refinement model covering accept/publish values, verified-clean no-publication, reject no-publication, dependency-effect preservation, invalidation-record preservation, publication decision matching, and required trace-family preservation

semantic_equivalence_statement: This run checks bounded TLA model evidence only. It does not change TraceCalc execution semantics, TreeCalc/CoreEngine behavior, dependency graph construction, invalidation, rebind behavior, recalc tracker behavior, evaluation order, working-value reads, OxFml/OxFunc behavior, publication semantics, rejection policy, pack decisions, or service readiness.
